{{Quote|Father always said you were the most ''stubborn'' of his Knights, Sinde.|[[Roan Fel]] to [[Treis Sinde]]|<ref name="Legacy 33" />}}
'''Fel II''' was the second [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] under the [[Fel dynasty]].

==Biography==
[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] Fel II was the son of [[Jagged Fel]], the father of [[Roan Fel]], the grandfather of [[Marasiah Fel]] and the uncle of [[Mohrgan Fel]].

The [[Imperial Knight]] [[Treis Sinde]] served Fel II early in his career, and the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] would later remark on Sinde's stubborn streak to his own son, Roan.<ref name="Legacy 33" />
